notes: v0.14.9 — NEXUS re-priced to 200 SURGE (premium currency) instead of 10,000 PULSE. VOID stays at 10,000 PULSE. Skin definitions carry a currency field now; _buy_skin deducts from the right wallet. Price chips render the canonical currency icon (PULSE hex coin or SURGE sparkle star) before the number, old plain '... PULSE' suffix gone. SURGE prices use amber chip color, PULSE stays cyan, insufficient funds turns red. Windows only.
